stories.title: Korda Goes for History at KPMG Women's PGA Championship

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Korda won the Chevron. She won the Women's U.S. Open.

She tees it up TODAY at the KPMG Women's PGA.

Win here = first player to take the first 3 majors of a year since Inbee Park in 2013.

History is on the line. ⛳

#GolfFanrecap #KPMG #NellyKorda

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
$13 million purse. Record for women's golf.

Korda is chasing a 3rd straight major at Hazeltine National.
Minjee Lee is defending the title she won last year.

One of these players makes history this week.

#GolfFanrecap #KPMG #LPGAGolf

article.headline: Korda's Historic Bid: Win No. 3 at KPMG Would Make Her First Since Inbee Park 2013

stories.title: Travelers Championship Round 1 Underway — Scheffler, Burns, Clark Headlines Field

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Round 1 of the Travelers Championship is underway.

Scheffler + Burns paired at 1:55 PM ET.
Clark + Fleetwood at 2:05 PM ET.

$20M Signature Event. Keegan Bradley defending.
Rory McIlroy NOT in the field.

Who wins this week?

#GolfFanrecap #TravelersChampionship #PGATour

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Wyndham Clark just won the U.S. Open last week.

This week he's back at the Travelers Championship.
He's paired with Tommy Fleetwood.

Can he carry Shinnecock momentum to TPC River Highlands?

#GolfFanrecap #TravelersChampionship #WyndhamClark

stories.title: Wyndham Clark Wins 2026 U.S. Open at Shinnecock Hills

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Wyndham Clark won the 2026 U.S. Open at Shinnecock Hills.

Final score: -4 (276). Wire-to-wire.
Runner-up: Sam Burns at -3.

His 2nd U.S. Open title (first in 2023).

Now he's back at the Travelers this week. 🏆

#GolfFanrecap #USOpen #WyndhamClark

article.headline: Clark's Wire-to-Wire Win: How Wyndham Clark Won the 2026 U.S. Open at Shinnecock Hills

stories.title: LIV Golf Louisiana Event Postponed — PIF Funding Crisis Looms

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
LIV Golf postponed their Louisiana event today.

FIFA World Cup conflicts + summer heat cited.
Louisiana paid $3.2M; gets back all but $2M.

PIF is ending LIV funding after 2026.
O'Neil can't guarantee the last 4 events happen.

LIV is in trouble. ⚠️

#GolfFanrecap #LIVGolf

article.headline: LIV Louisiana Postponed, PIF Funding Ends After 2026 — LIV Golf's Most Turbulent Week

stories.title: Niemann's Club-Throw at U.S. Open — Golf's First Major Misconduct Penalty of 2026

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Joaquin Niemann threw his club 50 yards at the U.S. Open.

Penalty: 2 strokes. Rule 1.2b. Misconduct.
First such call at a major in 2026.

His response: shot 65 the next day.

Made the cut. Moved on. 👀

#GolfFanrecap #USOpen #GolfRules

article.headline: Club-Throw, 2-Stroke Penalty, Then a 65: Niemann's Wild U.S. Open Story
